canonical_name: JANUS A18.43 V0.2.3 — Through the Horizon Live Atlas Pilot
operator_goals: Measure exact configuration-specific hidden runtime capacity and the work cardinality crossing admission, submission and completion horizons.
Measure calibration-only bypass budgets without activating a live bypass controller.
Test whether a fixed probe wave quota=3 depends on previous persistent-process epochs, primer shape or clean-valley duration.
Map and repeat intervention triggers 0 through 16.
Record controlled-decompression shape as Horizon Echo / Foam Fingerprint.

airlock_refinement.ack_rule: Admissions and submissions must not advance. Already-buffered worker completions may settle only if finalized and exposure advance consistently, prepared does not increase, the process tree is unchanged, and a stable post-ACK snapshot is resealed. The post-ACK snapshot is authoritative.

activation_gates: One live Event-Horizon BEACON must pass before the intervention matrix.
The complete horizon stage must pass before persistent-memory tests.
Any interlock failure stops the master suite.
Measured bypass recipes remain calibration-only and require a frozen held-out challenge.
claim_limits: The apparent capacity is configuration-specific; 16 is not universal and is not a physical-core claim.
Wave memory means possible runtime carryover, never memory in SHA-256.
Two repetitions are exploratory and do not prove a shaping recipe.
No energy saving or hardware-life extension is claimed.
No SHA-256 weakness, valid-proof advantage, mining advantage or profitability is claimed.
